name: genflowai-codex-plugin
description: Find GenflowAI templates for reusable AI creative workflows, ecommerce product photography, UGC videos, ad creatives, and video workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Find reusable AI creative workflow templates.
interface.longDescription: GenflowAI helps Codex discover reusable AI creative workflow templates for ecommerce product visuals, AI product photography, UGC video ads, AI ad creatives, product video generation, image-to-video workflows, text-to-video workflows, fashion editorials, jewelry campaigns, perfume visuals, Amazon assets, and social media content. The plugin searches the live GenflowAI marketplace and prepares launch links users can open in GenflowAI Studio.
defaultPrompt: Find a GenflowAI template for AI product photography
Prepare a GenflowAI UGC video ad workflow
List GenflowAI templates for ecommerce videos
